place: Bophut Hills, Bo Phut, Koh Samui, Thailand
title: White House — Bophut Hills Sea-View Villa
blurb: A fully renovated hillside villa in the sought-after Bophut Hills community — five en-suite bedrooms plus a flexible bonus room, an infinity pool over the tropical hills and sea, a huge garden, and a self-contained studio with its own entrance.
detail:
A fully renovated sea-view villa set in the sought-after Bophut Hills community on Koh Samui's north-east coast. Past a covered two-car parking bay, the entrance walkway opens onto a terrace between the main living wing and one of the bedrooms, where an open-plan living and dining room with a new Western kitchen flows straight out to the poolside terrace — alfresco dining and easy days by the infinity pool, overlooking lush tropical hills and the ocean beyond. A discreet chef's prep kitchen sits off the main kitchen.

The home offers five bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms, plus a flexible bonus room that can serve as a family room, home office or gym, opening onto the lawn through floor-to-ceiling glass. Two master suites sit on the main living level, with further suites on the garden floor reached by stairs descending beside the pool. Outside, a huge tropical garden wraps the villa with generous lawn, sunbeds and outdoor dining.

For maximum flexibility, a separate entrance leads to a self-contained one-bedroom studio with its own living space and kitchenette — ideal as a guest, staff or rental apartment. Offered freehold or leasehold and sold fully furnished, the villa is a short drive from Fisherman's Village, international schools and Samui International Airport.

features.l: Infinity pool over the sea & hills
Flex room — family room / office / gym
